overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City's urban environment at night. The scene features neon-lit streets, digital billboards, and cyberpunk architecture as the character moves from a plaza through city streets and crosses an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with neon kiosk under overhead transit structure

events.description: moving from covered area under transit structure into open plaza
slight turn to the right to navigate around the kiosk structure

agents.ego_description: walking through urban plaza passing a police car and approaching a brightly lit cyan neon kiosk

notable_agents.action: police officer standing near parked police car at the start of the clip

entered.detail: white and black police vehicle parked near concrete stairs
wide concrete staircase leading up to overhead transit structure
futuristic hexagonal kiosk structure with bright cyan neon lighting and Japanese signage
large elevated industrial walkway or transit line with support beams spanning the plaza
large red illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a semi-covered urban plaza at night, with the player moving past a police car and concrete stairs toward a brightly lit cyan neon kiosk. The environment features heavy industrial overhead structures and scattered pedestrians, establishing the cyberpunk atmosphere of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large digital billboards and descending ramps to street level

events.description: descending from plaza level to street level via concrete ramps
turning right to align with the sidewalk path at street level

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza and descending steps to reach the street level

entered.detail: massive vertical screen displaying FEEL THE FURY advertisement with purple neon lighting
multi-story building facade covered in extensive black and white graffiti art
rectangular concrete seating structures arranged in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the player passes large digital billboards and graffiti-covered buildings while descending to street level. The environment transitions from the semi-covered kiosk area to a more open space with concrete planters before reaching the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street sidewalk with overhead industrial structures and neon signage

events.description: car passes by on the street to the left of the player
slight acceleration to follow the NPC in the tan coat ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following an NPC in a tan trench coat through the neon-lit street canyon

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan trench coat and cap walking steadily ahead of the player on the sidewalk

entered.detail: asphalt road with distinctive red painted curbs typical of Night City streets
white brick building wall covered in black graffiti tags and street art
vertical purple neon sign illuminating the building facade
red illuminated sign indicating M Ebunike metro station entrance

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow city street sidewalk flanked by graffiti-covered buildings and overhead industrial structures. Following an NPC in a tan coat, the character moves past neon signs and the M Ebunike metro station while cars occasionally pass by on the red-curbed street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: traffic light changes to green, vehicles begin moving through the intersection
stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the street
turning right at the opposite corner to continue along the new sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, crossing the street at the crosswalk, and turning right on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection as the player crosses the street

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes across the asphalt
vertical traffic signal showing green light for vehicles
large pink and purple advertisement screen displaying FEEL THE FURY
short yellow posts marking the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player approaching a busy intersection, waiting for the traffic light to change, then crossing the street while vehicles pass by. The character turns right at the corner, passing yellow bollards and large pink digital billboards, completing the urban traversal through Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district, moving from a sheltered industrial plaza into the bustling flow of a city intersection. It begins in a semi-covered plaza, gliding past a police car and concrete stairs toward a glowing cyan neon kiosk beneath heavy overhead structures. As the camera moves through the open plaza, it passes large digital billboards and graffiti-covered walls while descending from the kiosk area to street level. The scene then shifts to a narrow sidewalk flanked by industrial architecture and neon signs, following a pedestrian in a tan coat past the M Ebunike metro station. Finally, the movement leads to a busy intersection where the camera waits for a traffic light before crossing the street and turning right past yellow bollards and towering pink digital billboards.
